title: DiscoverCraft
description: DiscoverCraft is a modpack where you can explore things with your friends.
body: ## **No more updates** ## Welcome to DiscoverCraft **Welcome to DiscoverCraft this modpack has essential. Essential is a multiplayer mod so you can play with your friends. Some mods or resource packs need optifine so here is a link:[https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar)** **Join DiscoverCraft so you can discover the world and all of the new things new dimensions new biomes new mobs and find some magic or technology** ### What is essential? **Essential is a multiplayer mod so you can join your friends in a single player lobby so you don't need to use money to play with your friends. Here is a video how it work: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-PSfSs8RGiM** ### Here is all of the resource packs **Enhanced Boss Bars, Fresh Animations, Jicklus, Authentic Shadows.**
